title: BulkResponse
description: Structural description of the BulkResponse object in the TVmaze tvmaze-premium API.

root.name: BulkResponse
root.description: A list of responses to your bulk input, ordered the same as your input

fields.name: code
fields.description: The HTTP code that corresponds to this item

fields.name: errors
fields.description: A list of validation errors for this item (in case of error)

fields.name: input
fields.description: The request data that belonged to this response (in case of error)

fields.name: message
fields.description: A human-readable error message (in case of error)

fields.name: result
fields.description: The resulting created/updated object (in case of success)
